languages.text: {n}Вы перелезаете обратно за забор. Лошадь за вашей спиной беспокойно фыркает.{/n}
{n}You slip back through the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы перелезаете обратно за забор. Лошадь за вашей спиной беспокойно фыркает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You climb back over the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你从栅栏外面重新溜了回来，那匹马在你身后发出了不耐烦的哼哧声。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You slip back through the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你从栅栏外面重新溜了回来，那匹马在你身后发出了不耐烦的哼哧声。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Regresas a través de la verja. El caballo resopla impaciente detrás de ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You slip back through the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Regresas a través de la verja. El caballo resopla impaciente detrás de ti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çitten geri süzülüyorsun. Arkandaki at, huzursuzca homurdanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You slip back through the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çitten geri süzülüyorsun. Arkandaki at, huzursuzca homurdanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}フェンスを通って後ろに戻る。馬はあなたの後ろでそわそわと鼻を鳴らす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You slip back through the fence. The horse snorts restlessly behind you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}フェンスを通って後ろに戻る。馬はあなたの後ろでそわそわと鼻を鳴らす。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous glissez de nouveau à travers la clôture. Visiblement agité, le cheval s'ébroue derrière vous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du schlüpfst zurück durch den Zaun. Das Pferd schnaubt rastlos hinter dir.{/n}
